ogTitle: Merriang South vs Merricks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merriang South and Merricks.
heading: Merriang South vs Merricks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merriang South, Victoria and Merricks, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merricks has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Merriang South (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merriang South or Merricks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merriang South has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Merricks scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merriang South scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Merricks scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merriang South or Merricks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merricks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
